name: claw-mesh
description: CLAW Mesh - WireGuard 全网状 VPN + AI 集群调度器

scripts.ontology:search: node -e "const { Ontology } = require('./memov/ontology'); const o = new Ontology(); o.initVectorStore().then(() => o.search(process.argv[1])).then(console.log)"
scripts.causal:analyze: node -e "const { CausalAnalyzer } = require('./memov/causal'); const a = new CausalAnalyzer(); a.addEvent('test', 'test', 'failure', {}); console.log(a.rootCauseAnalysis('test'))"

author: CLAW Mesh Team
